body.u: I left school at the age of 16 hopeinghoping to find a job after giving up the hope of becoming an art student at Medway college of Design. I was on the dole for six months after leaving school, until I got a job in a garage, just helping clear up and help serve the customers who come to get petrol. Then after a couple of months the manager asked if I would like to try something like an apprenticeship emidiatlyimmediately I took the offer. I spent three years as an aprenticeapprentice motor mechanic, after that I took on a job as a motor mechanic at Sheppey Autos and worked for a mister Turner. I stayed theirthere for a couple of years, as I liked it very much theirthere.

Around this time my mum started nag me to try to find some other place to live well I was twenty two. I had had some girl friends but never really took to any particular one. Then I started to go with a girl named Emma, she was quite nice.

I was twenty three when I got an offer from my uncaluncle in Derby to go and work with him in his garage, dealing with Rolls Royce. I took his offer and I earned £51 a week. Emma and I finally got engaged, we saved and managed to get a house and then the big day we got mariedmarried.

At the age of thirty one I still had the same job and me and Emma had a house just inside Derby in Tutbury. It was a big year because we were exspectingexpecting patter of tiny feet. Not much happened after that, it was just day in day out routine, Paul grew fast and it was not long before he was at school. He had just settled down when me and my wife decided to move to the Isle of Sheppey back to my home. Eventually we did move. And when I saw the Island I was shocked. It was much cleaner and better than when I was a kid.

We stayed on the Island we got a house in Minster quite nice near the beach. The years pastpassed on we had another little one when paul was a comprehensive school. Funny enough the one I went to, I was surprised it was still standing.
Then it had to come I reached the age of fortiefourty, by this time I was managing my own garage and imployingemploying youngsters.
